hero.title: Pure Dairy, Crafted with Care
hero.subtitle: Premium farm-fresh milk, ghee, paneer and more — sourced from grass-fed cows and delivered to your door.

features.title: Crafted for the table you love

organic.title: 100% Organic
organic.desc: Grass-fed, hormone-free dairy from trusted farms.

delivery.title: Daily Delivery
delivery.desc: Fresh from farm to your door every morning.

quality.title: Quality Assured
quality.desc: Lab-tested for purity at every step.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.desc: We're always here to help with your order.

aiSection.title: AI choreographs every drop of freshness.
aiSection.subtitle: Our neural supply stack watches cattle vitals, chillers, and rider routes so your dairy reaches you with peak nutrition intact. It's like having a personal maître d' for milk.

predictiveHarvest.title: Predictive Harvest
predictiveHarvest.desc: AI forecasts how much milk we need every dawn to avoid waste and shortages.

nutrientScan.title: Nutrient Scan
nutrientScan.desc: Sensors grade every batch for fat %, creaminess, and purity in seconds.

coldChain.title: Cold Chain Route
coldChain.desc: Dynamic routing keeps deliveries under 4°C until they reach your door.

bestsellers.title: Our Bestsellers
bestsellers.subtitle: Curated by smart demand signals and thousands of meal plans our customers love.

chef.quote: We switched to Kshira for our boutique bakery and the consistency is unreal. Customers taste the difference.
chef.name: Chef Myra Kapoor

soma.quote: The AI alerts help us plan weekly menus without over-ordering. Nothing goes to waste anymore.
soma.name: Soma Banerjee

ritu.quote: Kids can't stop talking about the chocolate milk drops. Delivery is always before breakfast!
ritu.name: Ritu & Aarav

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
